overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player character navigates wet streets lined with holographic advertisements, crosses a massive intersection dominated by a curved mega-tower, passes through a red-lit alley beneath an overpass, and emerges into an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked street passing neon signs and storefronts

entered.detail: large red neon sign with chinese characters
large digital billboard displaying WET DREAM text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, walking along a wet asphalt street lined with commercial buildings. Red neon signs and a prominent WET DREAM billboard illuminate the scene, reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement. Sparse vehicle traffic moves in the distance as the camera proceeds forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with mega-tower and digital billboards

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions to large intersection dominated by curved mega-tower
orange sports car drives past from right to left through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then crossing with other pedestrians as the orange sports car passes by

notable_agents.action: orange sports car driving through the intersection from right to left
pedestrian holding illuminated umbrella waiting at crosswalk

entered.detail: massive curved skyscraper covered in digital billboards and advertisements
numerous large digital screens displaying various advertisements on building facades
zebra-striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on wet asphalt
tall modern street lamps illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: Following a brief fade to black, the scene opens into a massive urban intersection dominated by a curved mega-tower covered in holographic advertisements. The camera crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk as an orange sports car drives past. Pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas wait at the corners, and the wet pavement reflects the myriad of digital billboards overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered alleyway beneath overpass with intense red neon lighting

events.description: entering covered area beneath concrete overpass with intense red neon lighting
following pedestrian with glowing red umbrella through narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian carrying a glowing red umbrella through the narrow red-lit alley beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking ahead of camera through the alley
person standing near metal shutters watching the street

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the alleyway
intense red fluorescent tube lights lining the alley walls
closed corrugated metal shutters on storefronts
scattered trash and debris accumulated along the alley walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alleyway sheltered beneath a massive concrete overpass, bathed in intense red neon light. Following a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella, the path winds past closed metal shutters and scattered debris. The enclosed space blocks the view of the mega-tower, creating an intimate, corridor-like atmosphere distinct from the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food stalls and scattered debris

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open plaza with food vendors and sitting pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing food stalls and people sitting on the wet ground

notable_agents.action: group of people sitting on the wet pavement near the building
vendor standing at red food stall cart

entered.detail: wide open concrete plaza area with wet reflective surface
red food vendor cart with vendor standing nearby
metal construction barriers and fencing along the right side
tall building facade illuminated with pink and purple neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow red-lit alley, the scene opens into a wide concrete plaza. A red food stall cart stands to the left with a vendor nearby, while groups of people sit on the wet pavement to the right. A tall building with prominent pink neon signage rises in the background, and metal construction barriers line the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-slicked futuristic city, moving from neon-lit commercial streets into a claustrophobic alley before emerging into an open urban plaza. It begins along a wet asphalt road where red neon signs and a prominent WET DREAM billboard reflect off the pavement. As the camera proceeds, the environment expands into a massive intersection dominated by a curved mega-tower and holographic advertisements, with an orange sports car speeding past pedestrians under illuminated umbrellas. The scene then shifts abruptly into a narrow, red-bathed alleyway beneath a concrete overpass, winding past metal shutters and debris in an intimate, enclosed space. Finally, the camera emerges from the red glow into a wide concrete plaza featuring a food stall and pink neon signage rising against the night sky.
